items.title: Honeywell (HON): Valuation Check After Indra Nooyi Joins the Board of Directors
items.description: Honeywell International (HON) just gave investors something new to chew on by appointing former PepsiCo chief Indra Nooyi to its board, a high profile governance move that could subtly reshape long term strategy. See our latest analysis for Honeywell International. The timing is interesting too, with Honeywell’s share price at $197.45 after a 1 day share price return of 1.96 percent and a year to date share price return of negative 12.45 percent.
